response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack, backend, and web development; however, he lacks the highly specialized hardware architecture experience required for this Principal Performance Architect role. The position heavily relies on SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, and deep learning accelerator optimization, none of which are demonstrated in his work history.
strengths: Over 15 years of robust software engineering experience across web, backend, and embedded systems.
Demonstrated ability to optimize software performance and build low-latency microservices.
Meets the baseline educational requirement with a BS in Computer Science and over 8 years of technical experience.
concerns: Complete lack of experience with SoC and IP modeling or hardware architecture design.
No demonstrated background in AI hardware accelerators, GPU architecture, or deep neural network optimization.
Career focus has been almost entirely on higher-level software applications rather than hardware-software co-design.
